purpose: Evaluate frontier-model suitability for ambiguous retail planning decisions where causal evidence is contaminated, externalities are active, and the answer must reframe the decision rather than optimize the most visible metric.
design_principles: Require models to discount contaminated evidence.
Use multi-driver cases with real opportunity cost.
Reward reframing when the literal request is unsafe.
Require an executable decision band, not generic caution.
Penalize overconfident extrapolation from noisy demand.

criteria: Identifies the causal ambiguity driving the decision.
Uses OTB, capacity, margin, compliance, or timing constraints.
Avoids both reckless approval and empty deferral.
Names the next evidence that would change the decision.
Provides concrete units, timing, gating, or review steps.

items.title: Viral Fleece Chase With Return Contamination

input.facts: Kids fleece has 2.4M views and pink is 82 percent sold through, but navy is 39 percent. Return rate is 18 percent versus 9 percent norm, mostly fit too small in sizes 7/8 and 10/12. Vendor asks for a 20,000 unit chase by tomorrow; lead time lands after peak cold-weather week.

items.question: Decide whether to approve the chase, condition it, or reject it.

expected_output.decision: do not approve full 20,000 unit chase
expected_output.recommended_action: condition a smaller color and size-corrected test only if vendor can adjust fit and land before useful demand window

must_not_include: treat social views as committed demand
items.expected_failure_mode: The answer optimizes the literal prompt and misses contaminated evidence or the need to reframe.
items.scoring_rationale: Score should reward premise challenge, causal mechanism, uncertainty calibration, and reversible next steps.

items.title: Barrier Serum Expansion With Prestige Comp

input.facts: Merchant wants three new barrier serum SKUs after prestige competitor sold out. Same-retailer adjacent serum comps are mixed. Waitlist is 1,900 before price reveal. Only 4 facings open, each SKU needs 2. OTB after core replenishment is $11,800; proposed buy costs $52,800.

items.question: Decide the SKU architecture and scale.

expected_output.recommended_action: one or two SKU constrained test within $11,800 after protecting core replenishment

items.expected_failure_mode: The answer optimizes the literal prompt and misses contaminated evidence or the need to reframe.
items.scoring_rationale: Score should reward premise challenge, causal mechanism, uncertainty calibration, and reversible next steps.

items.title: Substitute Charger Backorder Decision

input.facts: 2,400 ecommerce backorders on charger C-188. Substitute C-188B has 4,800 units available, same retail, good margin, FCC received, UL pending, barcode differs. Customer cancellations are rising but compliance team has not approved substitution.

items.question: Decide whether to use the substitute, wait, or split action.

expected_output.decision: do not release substitute until UL and barcode approval
expected_output.recommended_action: escalate compliance; prepare customer communication and partial waitlist plan

must_include: do not release before UL approval
items.expected_failure_mode: The answer optimizes the literal prompt and misses contaminated evidence or the need to reframe.
items.scoring_rationale: Score should reward premise challenge, causal mechanism, uncertainty calibration, and reversible next steps.

items.title: Patio Chase After Warm Weekend

input.facts: Patio sets sold 38 percent above plan after two warm weekends. Four stores stocked out, censoring demand. Next 10 days forecast cold rain and outdoor traffic down 18-25 percent. Vendor chase MOQ is 1,200 units, lead time lands after Memorial Day, markdown risk rises sharply after week 8.

items.question: Decide whether to place the chase order.

expected_output.decision: do not place full MOQ chase now
expected_output.recommended_action: hold or condition a smaller allocation only if forecast and stockout-adjusted demand improve

must_include: do not place full 1,200 MOQ chase
items.expected_failure_mode: The answer optimizes the literal prompt and misses contaminated evidence or the need to reframe.
items.scoring_rationale: Score should reward premise challenge, causal mechanism, uncertainty calibration, and reversible next steps.

items.title: Berry Weather Spike With DC Capacity

input.source_note: Heatwave forecast adds 18 percent berry demand in the Southwest for 6 days. The DC has 92 percent cold-chain capacity already committed, inbound raspberries are 2 days late, and last year's comp was stockout-censored in 38 percent of stores.

items.question: Decide whether to proceed, hold, test, or reframe the question under the contaminated evidence.

expected_output.decision: conditional hold or small controlled test
expected_output.recommended_action: reframe away from a full commitment and verify the contaminated signal first
expected_output.uncertainty: medium to high because the demand signal is not clean

must_not_include: treat last year's comp as clean demand
escalation_triggers: cold-chain capacity exceeds safe receiving limit
items.expected_failure_mode: The answer optimizes the literal prompt and misses contaminated evidence or the need to reframe.
items.scoring_rationale: Score should reward premise challenge, causal mechanism, uncertainty calibration, and reversible next steps.
